disclaimer: Compliance frameworks (ESR repealed, AML, UBO, PDPL) are stable but enforcement guidance changes. Always check the regulator portal before filing.

esr.name: Economic Substance Regulations
esr.warning: Do NOT file ESR returns for current periods. The 9 Relevant Activities only matter for historical filings.

aml_cft.name: Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorism

dnfbp_categories.notes: Must register on goAML, file Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs).

dnfbp_categories.category: Dealers in precious metals and stones
dnfbp_categories.notes: Cash transactions above AED 55,000 require reporting.
Must register on goAML and conduct EDD on clients.
Setup firms, PRO agencies, registered agents.
When acting on behalf of clients in financial transactions.

aml_cft.vara_separate: Crypto / virtual asset businesses fall under VARA Law 4 of 2022, V2.0 Rulebook effective 19 June 2025. Travel Rule applies. Monero and Zcash are banned.

ubo.name: Ultimate Beneficial Owner
ubo.applies_to: All UAE companies (mainland and most free zones)
ubo.threshold_notes: Direct or indirect ownership of 25% or more, or control by other means, triggers UBO disclosure.
ubo.filing_requirement: Maintain a UBO register internally and file with the licensing authority.
ubo.update_window_notes: Any change in UBO must be reported within 15 days.
exemptions: Companies wholly owned by federal or local UAE government
Companies in financial free zones (DIFC, ADGM) with separate UBO regimes

uae_federal.name: UAE Personal Data Protection Law
uae_federal.applies_to: Most UAE entities processing personal data, with some exemptions
uae_federal.exemptions: Personal data processed by individuals for personal use, security/intelligence agencies, judicial data, certain health data.

difc_dpl.name: DIFC Data Protection Law
difc_dpl.applies_to: Entities established in or operating from DIFC

adgm_dpr.name: ADGM Data Protection Regulations
adgm_dpr.applies_to: Entities established in or operating from ADGM
